commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6db45ccee2d77db2d223bb51362e47880d36af60)
commands.review_summary:
The PR extends stale-runtime import recovery across auto-reply lazy loaders, adds stable tsdown entries, regression tests, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked report at https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/68466 gives concrete ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND reply-drop logs, and source inspection shows current main still has unguarded sibling lazy-import paths in the same reply pipeline, though I did not run a live upgrade reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor or maintainer action is required because automation cannot supply the external real behavior proof, and the branch must be rebased across current-main refactors before normal review can continue.

target.title: fix(auto-reply): keep stale-runtime imports from dropping replies across all lazy loaders
target.author: martingarramon

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: martingarramon
commands.command: p2 — taking the rebase. the `!ctx.mediastaged` guard from current main was dropped when this branch went stale; restored it inside the new try/catch so synchronous prestaging still skips the second `stagesandboxmedia` pass, plus a focused regression on the prestaged-media path (`d290aec95f`). @greptile-apps p2 — noted but leaving as-is. the catch nullifies the cached promise on any throw inside `runbeforeagentreply` so we don't retain a half-failed module reference; narrowing to `err_module_not_found` is cleaner but a separate scope change.
commands.freeform_prompt: P2 — taking the rebase. The `!ctx.MediaStaged` guard from current main was dropped when this branch went stale; restored it inside the new try/catch so synchronous prestaging still skips the second `stageSandboxMedia` pass, plus a focused regression on the prestaged-media path (`d290aec95f`). @greptile-apps P2 — noted but leaving as-is. The catch nullifies the cached promise on any throw inside `runBeforeAgentReply` so we don't retain a half-failed module reference; narrowing to `ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND` is cleaner but a separate scope change.
